task: I want to purchase an open-box Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus in excellent condition and trade in a gray Galaxy S20 5G (Verizon), with a perfect screen, in good condition. How much would it cost?
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct Best Buy open-box product page for the Samsung Galaxy S25+ 256GB (Unlocked) in Open-Box Excellent condition, where the exact price $701.99 was visible on the page URL ending in /sku/6612715/openbox?condition=excellent. The page also showed the trade-in widget/modal. The agent then thoroughly checked Best Buy’s trade-in flow and product-page trade-in modal. Evidence on the modal showed Samsung guided-search model families starting at Galaxy S21 5G and not including Galaxy S20 5G, and the standalone trade-in catalog/search likewise did not list the S20 5G. Therefore the agent had sufficient evidence to conclude there is no Best Buy trade-in credit available for the requested gray Galaxy S20 5G (Verizon), making the effective cost the open-box price only: $701.99 before tax, with free shipping shown. This satisfies the task of determining how much it would cost.
final_result_response:
Best Buy’s product-page trade-in modal does not offer the Galaxy S20 5G. Under Samsung guided search, the earliest Galaxy S-series option shown is Galaxy S21 5G, with no S20 option listed.

So the cost is:

- Open-Box Excellent Samsung Galaxy S25+ 256GB Unlocked: $701.99
- Best Buy trade-in credit for Galaxy S20 5G Verizon: not available
- Estimated cost before tax: $701.99

Taxes would be added at checkout.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching Best Buy for the phone: await page.locator('e9').fill('Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus open box excellent');
Searching Best Buy for the phone: await page.locator('e10').click();
Searching product listings: await page.locator('e8').fill('Samsung Galaxy S25+ 256GB Unlocked');
Searching product listings: await page.locator('e9').click();
Opening phone product page: await page.locator('e106').click();
Opening more buying options: await page.getByText('New, Open-Box and Refurbished$589.95 - $1,140.79').click();
Opening Best Buy trade-in program: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/site/services/best-buy-trade-in/pcmcat133600050011.c');
Searching trade-in device: await page.locator('e25').fill('Galaxy S20 5G Verizon gray');
Submitting trade-in search: await page.locator('e26').click();
Trying broader trade-in search: await page.locator('e33').click();
Opening trade-in category selector: await page.locator('e131').click();
Choosing cell phone category: await page.locator('e134').click();
Selecting Samsung in trade-in form: await page.locator('e148').click();
Choosing Samsung brand: await page.locator('e156').click();
Switching to guided trade-in search: await page.locator('e158').click();
Opening model family options: await page.locator('e160').click();
Selecting Galaxy S20 from model list: await page.getByText('Galaxy S20').first().click();
Navigating model list by keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowUp');
Trying simpler trade-in search query: await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/trade-in/r/choose?searchQuery=Galaxy%20S20%205G');
Filtering trade-in results for Samsung: await page.locator('e37').click();
Filtering trade-in results for gray color: await page.locator('e45').click();
Trying exact trade-in query without color: await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/trade-in/r/choose?searchQuery=Samsung%20Galaxy%20S20%205G%20Verizon');
Closing buying options dialog: await page.locator('e116').click();
Closing more buying options sheet: await page.locator('e588').click();
Testing trade-in quote flow with a listed device: await page.locator('e504').click();
Reopening buying options for open-box price confirmation: await page.locator('e96').click();
Opening open-box details: await page.locator('e614').click();
Opening the trade-in value widget: await page.locator('e44').click();
Selecting Samsung in the product-page trade-in modal: await page.locator('e187').click();
Choosing Samsung in the modal: await page.locator('e195').click();
Using guided search in the modal: await page.locator('e198').click();
Opening modal model family list: await page.locator('e201').click();
